{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201754342CA174231EBFA016AC1C"}"},"total":4041},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6991285211300791047","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"比起大多数无心无我的独角戏真的不知道高了多少了已经，剧情的逻辑性很强而且在一些问题上有很多很有意思的梗与见解。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1627785440,"group_id":"6979989534943480840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzoKg1f3HZBb3kAwaLtMtgcbBqU3nGju74tuncTa9FEl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530160&x-signature=vBZRQcVlb%2BMBxSNfqFj9EkeoKP4%3D","user_id":"3905923934068622","user_name":"浪客吴明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3905923934068622","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6979989534943480840","book_info":{"abstract":"一觉醒来，外面黑暗笼罩，暴风雨肆虐，不知名血迹把墙角渗红，凄切哭声萦绕耳畔，窗外人影始终未曾离开。
而你和无数幸存者们，在属于自己的十平米庇护所中瑟瑟发抖。
你饿极了，打开一丝门缝向外凝望。
【出门后淋雨感冒概率：100%】
——感冒不是病，它只是降低了你的免疫力，让你感染概率增加，平时要多锻炼哟。
【寻找到食物概率：80%】
——食物并不难找，毕竟游戏有什么坏心眼，怎么会不给你吃的呢，剩下20%的概率是你有可能当场死在外面。
【被恶鬼缠身的概率：100%】
——虽然挺难过的，不过比起饿死，恶鬼怕个啥，干就完了奥利给！
【碰见宝箱的概率：10%】
——外面有好东西？心动不如行动~
又名《全球异界求生：我能看到概率》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/0be64d15da538d4c1256198e18b7fd29~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"曹操不迟到","author_id":"","book_id":"6979989534943480840","book_name":"黑暗生存游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6984563761667375624","read_count":"20232","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1627674"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"716","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/0be64d15da538d4c1256198e18b7fd29~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184474&x-signature=a%2BQWa0SOB5frxqomLuGPeT6ePp4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"125"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201754342CA174231EBFA016AC1C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":36,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12256,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33651,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":81653},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7114172526485390087","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者，可以的话，可以更一下上本吗？我总觉得上本不应该这样就结局，上本书还有很多东西没有展开。还可以写出很多好的东西。哪怕只是半年写出一章也行，至少不要让上本书就这样草草的结局啊。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1656397452,"group_id":"6979989534943480840","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"527362491168151"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6979989534943480840","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.7968137e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17968,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7114171856114139935","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很不错，角色都是活的，剧情也不狗血，绝对值得大家给一个五星的评价。所以，我给了。
但是在我看来，这本小说远不如上一本。作者的上一本小说，让我每天看一眼更新了几张、让我每天都回味小说里的内容、让我的大脑紧跟着剧情去思考、让我的心整个吊起来，为主角祈祷。
但这本书不行。这本书相较上本书而言，少了很多东西。我觉得，这本书更有脑子的爽文，上本书则是真正写出了很多东西。在小说好看的基础上，在上本书里真的可以让我学到了不少别的东西。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1656397305,"group_id":"6979989534943480840","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不想码字了，开摆！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8EW8b4qNXy7miKNnAC8dL8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cc7dec0d89c94fcb8b4a8542c8c9bd44~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536999&x-signature=hPv6TI7yJLUK4Lt%2FVrMYKK4eics%3D","user_id":"527362491168151","user_name":"漫迷度殇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"527362491168151","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6979989534943480840","book_info":{"abstract":"一觉醒来，外面黑暗笼罩，暴风雨肆虐，不知名血迹把墙角渗红，凄切哭声萦绕耳畔，窗外人影始终未曾离开。
